user.title: Set up EM2GO Home PV surplus charging
user.description: PV surplus charging controller for the EM2GO Home wallbox (Modbus TCP). Writes to the wallbox only while the 'Control active' switch is on.

data.home_soc_entity: Sensor: home battery SOC (%, optional - without it, no battery logic is applied)
data.pv_forecast_entity: Sensor: PV forecast for the rest of the day (kWh, optional)
data.car_soc_entity: Sensor: car state of charge (%, optional, display only)
data.car_end_entity: Sensor: car charge end time (optional, display only)
data.car_location_entity: Device tracker: car location (optional - if empty, home presence is not checked)
data.car_power_entity: Sensor: car charging power (optional, display only)
data.control_on_start: Enable control immediately after startup (writes to the wallbox)
data.id_prefix: Entity ID prefix (e.g. 'pvsc'; use a distinct one per wallbox, like 'pvsc_garage')

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure EM2GO Home PV surplus charging
reconfigure.description: Change the Modbus connection (host/IP, port, unit ID) and the sensor entities used by the calculation. Live settings (SOC thresholds, delays, overrides, …) are kept. The integration reloads after saving.

data.home_soc_entity: Sensor: home battery SOC (%, optional - without it, no battery logic is applied)
data.pv_forecast_entity: Sensor: PV forecast for the rest of the day (kWh, optional)
data.car_soc_entity: Sensor: car state of charge (%, optional, display only)
data.car_end_entity: Sensor: car charge end time (optional, display only)
data.car_location_entity: Device tracker: car location (optional - if empty, home presence is not checked)
data.car_power_entity: Sensor: car charging power (optional, display only)
data.control_on_start: Enable control immediately after startup (writes to the wallbox)
data.id_prefix: Entity ID prefix (e.g. 'pvsc'; use a distinct one per wallbox, like 'pvsc_garage')

error.invalid_prefix: Invalid prefix: use lowercase letters, digits and underscores, starting with a letter (max. 31 characters).
error.prefix_in_use: This prefix is already used by another wallbox entry.

data.modbus_reconnect_backoff: Modbus cool-down after errors before reconnecting (seconds, doubles on repeated errors)
data.modbus_connect_settle_delay: Modbus settle delay after a fresh connection (seconds)
data.modbus_framing: Modbus framing: 'mbap' (standard Modbus TCP, correct for the EM2GO) or 'rtu' (raw RTU frames, test fallback)
data.max_ampere: Maximum charging current (A, 16 for 11 kW, 32 for 22 kW model)
data.state_change_on_delay: Start delay (seconds) - how long the surplus must exceed the minimum before charging actually starts
data.state_change_off_delay: Stop delay (seconds) - how long the surplus must be insufficient before charging actually stops
data.ampere_change_delay: Current adjustment delay (seconds) - how long the target current must differ before the wallbox setpoint is adjusted
data.ampere_deadband: Amps deadband (A) - minimum change in the target current before the wallbox setpoint is actually adjusted
data.charge_priority: Charging priority with multiple wallboxes (1 = highest; a lower-priority box only starts when no higher-priority box is waiting to start, and yields first when surplus drops)
data.fleet_max_watts: Fleet power limit across ALL wallboxes (W, 0 = off; the lowest value configured on any entry applies; also caps manual override)

phase_auto.name: Automatic phase switching (1↔3) in PV mode
